billing.walletSub: Auto-tops up 1 coin daily for 7 days after sign-up

kid.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again later.

faq.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a: Settings → Subscription → tap 'Cancel subscription'. Service continues until the end of the current billing period.
Within 30 days of withdrawal you can cancel and recover everything. After 30 days, data is permanently deleted.
1 coin is consumed per drawing. Free coins are topped up daily, and subscribers get unlimited use.

faq.q: How do I add a child profile?
faq.a: Settings → Account → Add child profile. Up to 5 profiles per family account.

faq.q: How do I join an event?
faq.a: Pick an event from the Events tab and follow the submission steps. Identity verification may be required.

contact.title: 1:1 Contact
contact.subtitle: Mon–Fri 10:00–18:00 · Usually within 1 business day
contact.successToast: Your inquiry was received. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorToast: Could not submit your inquiry. Please try again later.

danger.logoutSub: Sign out only on this device

danger.withdrawDescLine1: On withdrawal, works · coins · subscription will be cleared. Choose immediate or 30-day grace.
danger.withdrawDescLine2: Per GDPR · COPPA we offer a ZIP download and immediate deletion.

passwordPage.title: Change password
passwordPage.subtitle: We recommend changing your password every 6 months.
passwordPage.infoNote: Your password protects family billing and child safety settings. Mix letters, numbers, and symbols instead of guessable words.
passwordPage.errorGeneric: Failed to change the password. Please try again later.
passwordPage.successToast: Password changed. Please sign in again.

languagePage.subtitle: Choose the interface language for the whole app.
languagePage.previewNote: Applied immediately to all text and notifications.

childrenEditPage.loadErrorGeneric: Could not load the child profile.

childDelete.title: Which child profile would you like to delete?
childDelete.subtitle: Pick individuals or delete all child profiles at once.
childDelete.emptySub: There are no child profiles to delete.
childDelete.modeIndividualSub: Pick child cards to delete one or more
childDelete.modeAllSub: Delete all {count} child profiles at once
childDelete.summaryEmptyMsg: Pick cards or choose "Delete all children"
childDelete.summaryHelp: Tap ✕ on a chip to remove one.
childDelete.partialFailureTitle: Some children could not be deleted.

modal.downloadHint: You can download artworks as a ZIP before deletion.
modal.agree1: I understand that works, awards, and in-progress drawings cannot be recovered after deletion.
modal.agree2All: I confirm that all {count} child profiles will be removed and only the family account remains.
modal.agree2Multi: I confirm that the {count} selected child profiles will be removed.
modal.agree2Single: I confirm that in-progress drawings and unclaimed rewards will all be lost.
modal.footerNote: 🛡 Recoverable via support within 30 days after deletion
modal.impactHeading: Deleting will also remove the following

stepTitle.4: Save your art as a ZIP
stepTitle.5: Review the data that will be removed

heroSub.1: Telling us why you're leaving really helps us improve.
heroSub.2: Children are linked to your family account. Choose how to handle them.
heroSub.3: Decide when to delete your data. If you might change your mind, we recommend the 30-day grace.
heroSub.4: Last chance before deletion. You can download your child's works and activity logs.
heroSub.5: Once withdrawn, the items below will be permanently deleted. Please confirm again.
heroSub.6: For account security, we'll re-verify your password and registered phone.
heroSub.7: Pressing [Permanently delete] starts the 30-day grace. Sign in within that time to cancel.

withdraw.exitConfirmMsg: Stop the withdrawal flow? Your input will be lost.
withdraw.successInstant: Withdrawal received. All data will be deleted immediately. (BE not implemented — mock)
withdraw.successGrace: Withdrawal received. Sign back in within 30 days to cancel. (BE not implemented — mock)

price.label: Pricing is too much
price.hint: Is ₩4,900/month too much? Save up to 33% with the yearly plan.

use.label: I rarely use it
use.hint: Get a free 1-month locker so you can come back anytime.

quality.label: Not enough drafts/content
quality.hint: We add new templates every week. What kind would you like more of?

privacy.label: Worried about privacy
privacy.hint: Let us walk you through Safe Mode and minimal data collection again.

kid.label: My kid lost interest
kid.hint: Try Step-by-step or Together mode. We have age-appropriate templates too.

other.label: Other
other.hint: Please tell us in your own words what was lacking.

all.title: Withdraw together with children
all.desc: All child profiles, works, and award histories are deleted with the account. The most common choice.

keep.title: Withdraw the family account only, keep children
keep.desc: Only the family account is removed; child profiles and works are delegated to a co-parent.

partial.title: Delete only some children
partial.desc: Delete only the children you select. You'll choose who in the next step.

step2.delegationNote: Choosing "Withdraw the family account only" sends a delegation invite to the co-parent's email.

grace.title: Delete after 30 days
grace.desc: For 30 days you can sign back in to cancel. After that, automatic deletion.

instant.title: Delete immediately
instant.desc: All data is permanently deleted right away. Per GDPR Art. 17 / COPPA.

step3.legalNote: Per GDPR Art. 17 'right to be forgotten' and US COPPA, requested data is removed from all processing and backup systems within 14 days. Items legally required to be retained (e.g., payment records for 5 years) are stored separately and encrypted.

step4.sizeNote: Estimated ~{total} MB · Delivered by email within 24 hours
step4.downloadToast: ZIP download requested. It will be sent to your registered email within 24 hours. (BE not implemented — mock)
step4.rightNote: This is your right under GDPR Art. 20 data portability. Free of charge.

kept.heading: Items retained by law
kept.footnote: * These items are stored in a separate encrypted vault and cannot be restored without additional verification.

step6.otpPlaceholder: 6 digits sent to your registered number
step6.otpToast: Verification code sent. (BE not implemented — mock)
step6.otpTimerPre: ⏱ 02:48 left · If the code didn't arrive,
step6.securityNote: Verification info is discarded right after authentication. After 5 failures, the account is locked for 24 hours.

step7.agree1: I confirm and accept everything above.
step7.agree2: I understand that my child's works and award history will be permanently deleted.
step7.agree3: I understand remaining coins and subscription days will not be refunded.

cancelPage.title: Welcome back!
cancelPage.description: You're in the 30-day grace period. Cancelling now restores all works · child profiles · subscriptions. After 18 days they will auto-delete and cannot be recovered.
cancelPage.footer: All features restored immediately on cancellation · No new charge
cancelPage.successToast: Withdrawal cancelled. All features restored immediately. (BE not implemented — mock)
